ogTitle: Notting Hill vs Nowa Nowa: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Notting Hill and Nowa Nowa.
heading: Notting Hill vs Nowa Nowa — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Notting Hill, Victoria and Nowa Nowa, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nowa Nowa has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Notting Hill (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Notting Hill or Nowa Nowa safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Notting Hill has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Nowa Nowa scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Notting Hill scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Nowa Nowa scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Notting Hill or Nowa Nowa?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nowa Nowa has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
